topics.title: Secret Lives of Mormon Wives Season 4 Keeps the Lavender Marriage Conversation Alive
topics.trending_reason: Season 4 premiered March 12, 2026 on Hulu and is generating massive social chatter. Whitney Leavitt and husband Conner's lavender marriage speculation has never been fully resolved. Season 4 brings fresh drama: Taylor's Bachelorette cancellation, Jessi and Jordan's divorce after an emotional affair.
topics.llma_angle: The Whitney/Conner lavender marriage speculation is the clearest mainstream pop-culture entry point for LLMA's core thesis. Reframe from 'are they lying?' to 'what if that's a valid and even beautiful choice?' Also covers Jessi's divorce — real emotional intimacy vs. performative partnership.

topics.title: Amanda Batula and Kyle Cooke's Summer House Split Exposes the 'Brand Marriage' Trap
topics.trending_reason: Announced separation in January 2026 after 4 years. Summer House Season 10 airing now. Kyle kissed RHOC alum Meghan King on April 16. Amanda says she's 'on cloud nine.' Wes Wilson romance rumors. The Ringer did a full breakdown episode on April 3, 2026.
topics.llma_angle: Textbook 'brand marriage' — a partnership as much about shared business identity (Loverboy, influencer couple persona) as romance. Amanda's 'never been happier' quote is practically a manifesto for conscious uncoupling. When does partnership stop being romantic and become platonic — and is that a failure or evolution?

topics.title: The Platonic Co-Parenting App Boom: Gen Z Is Deliberately Choosing Partnership Over Romance
topics.trending_reason: LetsBeParents grew from 1,200 to 10,000 monthly users since 2023. A TikTok by Maddie Joy about best friends planning to co-parent together went viral at 9.9M views. #platoniclifepartner has 11M+ TikTok views. Zola's 2026 First Look Report shows nearly half of Gen Z who won't marry still want a partnership ceremony.
topics.llma_angle: This is LLMA's origin story playing out at scale. The platonic co-parenting trend is exactly the 'redefining love and commitment' territory LLMA was built for. LLMA can position as the community and framework for people designing alternative family structures — not anti-love, but pro-authentic-design.

selected_hook_topic: Amanda Batula and Kyle Cooke Summer House split
